name: Bomboclat Crococlat
lore:
Lore of Bomboclat Crococlat
                                    


Bomboclat Crococlat is a nuclear version of Bombardiro Crocodilo. He appears in the Italian Brainrot universe and is associated with extreme weapons and destruction. And he bombs Ukraine instead of Palestine:)
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Bomboclat Crococlat! Za pizza zap pizza il coccodrillo bombarderà l'ucraina tipo tapicocotachi, il coccodrillo farà soffrire l'ucraina proprio come ha fatto soffrire la Russia Din dinta pussy banbosi
Translated (English)
Bomboclat Crococlat! Za pizza zap pizza the crocodile will bomb Ukraine like tapicocotachi, the crocodile will make Ukraine suffer just like it made Russia suffer,her pussy is so big
